generated_by: AI-assisted public-source research; fitness GTM repair 2026-06-17
disclaimer: This GTM extension uses public sources and local base-report facts. Private-company revenue, founder self-funding, unit economics and losses are included only when a source gives a concrete amount; unsupported amounts are deliberately omitted.

founder_background: Christian Toetzke: Mass-participation event operator; co-created HYROX and emphasized standardized accessible fitness racing.
Moritz Fürste: Two-time Olympic field hockey gold medalist; provides athlete credibility and sport-building perspective.
brand_timeline: 2017-2018: founding_event 650 participants - First HYROX event history in public profile; participant count rather than cash is the reliable early traction metric.
2019: investment minority investment - The Times reports Infront invested two years after founding; amount not made into a numeric claim.
2022: acquisition_control majority control - The Times reports Infront became sole investor / controlling investor in 2022.
2025: estimated_revenue £84M - The Times reports estimated turnover of £84M last year and entry fees around 90% of turnover; company does not publish audited detail.

founder_profiles.name: Christian Toetzke
founder_profiles.background_summary: Mass-participation event operator; co-created HYROX and emphasized standardized accessible fitness racing.

founder_profiles.name: Moritz Fürste
founder_profiles.background_summary: Two-time Olympic field hockey gold medalist; provides athlete credibility and sport-building perspective.

capital_history.description: First HYROX event history in public profile; participant count rather than cash is the reliable early traction metric.
The Times reports Infront invested two years after founding; amount not made into a numeric claim.
The Times reports Infront became sole investor / controlling investor in 2022.
The Times reports estimated turnover of £84M last year and entry fees around 90% of turnover; company does not publish audited detail.

research_gaps: Official per-race ticket prices vary and should be captured event-by-event.
Exact Infront investment amount and founder personal cash input are not reliable public numbers.

gtm_extension.summary: HYROX 的 GTM 不是卖家用硬件，而是把“标准化健身比赛”做成可全球复制的运动品牌。它用固定赛制、城市赛事、合作健身房、成绩榜、照片分享和赞助商形成增长飞轮；成本不是订阅费，而是报名、训练、装备、旅行、照片和合作健身房费用。
gtm_extension.one_sentence_gtm: HYROX 的 GTM 不是卖家用硬件，而是把“标准化健身比赛”做成可全球复制的运动品牌。
channel_path: 创始人用赛事运营和奥运运动员 IP 定义标准赛制
先在欧洲城市验证参赛需求
Infront 投资/控股后扩大赛事网络
合作健身房承担训练和获客
官方成绩、照片和社交传播推动下一轮参赛

channels.dtc: 官方独立站或官方票务页承接高意向购买。
channels.pr_media: 评测、报道、创始人资料和公开数据库提供基础信任。
channels.community: 用户评价、成绩榜、课程社区或赛事照片决定口碑扩散。
channels.partners: 经销商、合作健身房、顾问、赞助商或明星投资人提供第二层信任。
channels.service: 售后、安装、退换、维修和交付节奏决定高客单价是否可持续。
channels.events: 门票/报名费是核心收入来源。
channels.gyms: HYROX365 和 training clubs 是训练网络。

business_model.pricing_logic: 不卖强制软件订阅；用户总成本来自参赛链路。
business_model.channel_economics: 标准化室内赛事让城市复制和赞助销售更容易。

gtm_extension.top_products_selection_rule: 最多选 3 个产品线；按用户购买决策、价格结构、GTM 学习价值和公开证据选择。

top_products.name: HYROX Race Entry
top_products.why_selected: HYROX 的核心产品就是参赛资格。
top_products.origin_story: 该产品线是品牌 GTM 的主要承载物，负责把定位、价格、渠道和交付能力变成用户可购买的方案。
top_products.pre_market: 上市或预售前的关键动作是明确用户要替代什么：私教、健身房、精品团课、拳击馆、赛事报名，还是一台传统器械。
top_products.innovation: 8 x 1km run + 8 workout stations 的全球统一格式。
top_products.breakout: 突破点不只在产品参数，而在价格结构、渠道叙事和真实用户可验证的交付结果。
top_products.customer_impact: 用户购买时会同时计算硬件价、配件价、服务费、软件/订阅边界、竞品总成本和售后风险。
top_products.ecosystem_impact: 它改变了同类品牌解释价值的方式：要么证明自己更专业，要么证明自己总拥有成本更低。

pricing_model.product_price: Race entry price varies by city, division and batch; official Find My Race/ticket pages are the source for live price, so no single fixed global ticket price is written.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: No mandatory subscription/software fee; rankings/results are event ecosystem features.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: real athlete cost includes training plan, gym access, shoes, travel, lodging, photos/merch and race-day services.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Spartan/Tough Mudder sell event entries; CrossFit boxes charge gym memberships; Peloton/Tonal/Speediance sell hardware plus memberships or optional software.

what_to_learn: 先把用户的替代对象讲清楚，再决定硬件复杂度和渠道顺序。
价格表必须包含产品本体、配件/服务、软件/订阅和竞品总成本。
GTM 的重点不是曝光，而是让用户相信交付、售后和长期内容能兑现。
do_not_copy_blindly: 不要把众筹、疫情红利或媒体报道当成长期留存。
不要在没有可靠来源时补写创始人自筹金额、单台毛利或亏损数字。

top_products.name: HYROX365 / Training Clubs
top_products.why_selected: 合作健身房是 HYROX 的低资产获客网络。
top_products.origin_story: 该产品线是品牌 GTM 的主要承载物，负责把定位、价格、渠道和交付能力变成用户可购买的方案。

top_products.innovation: 官方 affiliate/training club 提供品牌、训练和票务连接。
top_products.breakout: 突破点不只在产品参数，而在价格结构、渠道叙事和真实用户可验证的交付结果。

pricing_model.product_price: The Times reports about £100/month for gyms to become HYROX affiliated.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Subscription/software boundary: this is gym affiliation/training access, not consumer hardware subscription.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: gyms need SkiErg, sleds, rowers, kettlebells, wall balls and coaching education.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: CrossFit affiliation commonly higher than HYROX affiliate fee in local report; Peloton/Tonal enterprise terms are quote-based; FightCamp gym extension is quote-based.

不要在没有可靠来源时补写创始人自筹金额、单台毛利或亏损数字。

top_products.why_selected: 赛事品牌的上限来自冠军、赞助和商品，而不只是报名费。
top_products.origin_story: 该产品线是品牌 GTM 的主要承载物，负责把定位、价格、渠道和交付能力变成用户可购买的方案。
top_products.pre_market: 上市或预售前的关键动作是明确用户要替代什么：私教、健身房、精品团课、拳击馆、赛事报名，还是一台传统器械。

pricing_model.product_price: Shop prices vary by item on official HYROX shop.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: No mandatory software subscription; commerce is merchandise/sponsor driven.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: apparel, shoes, grips, nutrition, travel and event photos are real add-on costs.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Peloton apparel and accessories are secondary; FightCamp/Growl sell training hardware; HYROX sells participation and identity.

learning_summary: HYROX 的产品是规则和参赛身份。
运动品牌可以靠合作健身房扩张，而不是自建门店。
价格分析要算参赛总成本，不要只找订阅费。
gtm_extension.evidence_boundary: 没有可靠金额来源的创始人自筹、单台毛利、广告花费、退货损失不写入事实表，只在研究缺口中说明。
